'''鈭歜-dh-s''' ('''badhasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrafilter|ultrafilter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrafilter|ultrafilter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| badhasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhasithi|badhasithi]] || [[word:badhasiji|badhasiji]] || [[word:badhasishi|badhasishi]] || [[word:badhasi|badhasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhasuthuth|badhasuthuth]] || [[word:badhasujuj|badhasujuj]] || [[word:badhasushush|badhasushush]] || [[word:badhas|badhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhasuthu|badhasuthu]] || [[word:badhasuju|badhasuju]] || [[word:badhasushu|badhasushu]] || [[word:badhasu|badhasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhasufuth|badhasufuth]] || [[word:badhasufuj|badhasufuj]] || [[word:badhasufush|badhasufush]] || [[word:badhasuf|badhasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhasethe|badhasethe]] || [[word:badhaseje|badhaseje]] || [[word:badhaseshe|badhaseshe]] || [[word:badhase|badhase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhasothoth|badhasothoth]] || [[word:badhasojoj|badhasojoj]] || [[word:badhasoshosh|badhasoshosh]] || [[word:badhas|badhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhasotho|badhasotho]] || [[word:badhasojo|badhasojo]] || [[word:badhasosho|badhasosho]] || [[word:badhaso|badhaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhasofoth|badhasofoth]] || [[word:badhasofoj|badhasofoj]] || [[word:badhasofosh|badhasofosh]] || [[word:badhasof|badhasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhas忙th忙|badhas忙th忙]] || [[word:badhas忙j忙|badhas忙j忙]] || [[word:badhas忙sh忙|badhas忙sh忙]] || [[word:badhas忙|badhas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhasathath|badhasathath]] || [[word:badhasajaj|badhasajaj]] || [[word:badhasashash|badhasashash]] || [[word:badhas|badhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhasatha|badhasatha]] || [[word:badhasaja|badhasaja]] || [[word:badhasasha|badhasasha]] || [[word:badhasa|badhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhasafath|badhasafath]] || [[word:badhasafaj|badhasafaj]] || [[word:badhasafash|badhasafash]] || [[word:badhasaf|badhasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:badhasasha|badhasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobadhasasha|gobadhasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibadhasasha|gokibadhasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:badhasn眉sha|badhasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobadhasnkn眉sha|gobadhasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhasn眉sha|gokibadhasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badhash毛sha|badhash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadhasnksh毛sha|gobadhasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadhash毛sha|gokibadhash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhasrosha|badhasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhasnkrosha|gobadhasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhasrosha|gokibadhasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:badhasmusha|badhasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhasnkmusha|gobadhasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhasmusha|gokibadhasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:badhasherasha|badhasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobadhasnksherasha|gobadhasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibadhasherasha|gokibadhasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:badhasngasha|badhasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobadhasnkngasha|gobadhasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibadhasngasha|gokibadhasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:badhasyasha|badhasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobadhasnkyasha|gobadhasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibadhasyasha|gokibadhasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:badhasyamasha|badhasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobadhasnkyamasha|gobadhasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibadhasyamasha|gokibadhasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhasn眉sh毛sha|badhasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhasnkn眉sh毛sha|gobadhasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhasn眉sh毛sha|gokibadhasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhasn眉rosha|badhasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhasnkn眉rosha|gobadhasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhasn眉rosha|gokibadhasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhasn眉musha|badhasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhasnkn眉musha|gobadhasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhasn眉musha|gokibadhasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhash毛n眉sha|badhash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhasnksh毛n眉sha|gobadhasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhash毛n眉sha|gokibadhash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhash毛rosha|badhash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhasnksh毛rosha|gobadhasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhash毛rosha|gokibadhash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhash毛musha|badhash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhasnksh毛musha|gobadhasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhash毛musha|gokibadhash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhasron眉sha|badhasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhasnkron眉sha|gobadhasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhasron眉sha|gokibadhasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhasrosh毛sha|badhasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhasnkrosh毛sha|gobadhasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhasrosh毛sha|gokibadhasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhasromusha|badhasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhasnkromusha|gobadhasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhasromusha|gokibadhasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhasmun眉sha|badhasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhasnkmun眉sha|gobadhasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhasmun眉sha|gokibadhasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhasmush毛sha|badhasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhasnkmush毛sha|gobadhasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhasmush毛sha|gokibadhasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhasmurosha|badhasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhasnkmurosha|gobadhasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhasmurosha|gokibadhasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:badhas|badhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙dh忙s|b忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobadhas|hobadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙dh忙s|hob忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobadhas|hohobadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙dh忙s|hohob忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉badhas|n眉badhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙dh忙s|n眉b忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉badhas|n眉n眉badhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙dh忙s|n眉n眉b忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂badhas|n茂badhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙dh忙s|n茂b忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂badhas|n茂n茂badhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙dh忙s|n茂n茂b忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubadhas|lubadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙dh忙s|lub忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubadhas|lulubadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙dh忙s|lulub忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libadhas|libadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙dh忙s|lib忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibadhas|lilibadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙dh忙s|lilib忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobadhas|kobadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙dh忙s|kob忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobadhas|kokobadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙dh忙s|kokob忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebadhas|kebadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙dh忙s|keb忙dh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebadhas|kekebadhas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙dh忙s|kekeb忙dh忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
